sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_enum (id UInt32, value Enum8('a' = 1, 'b' = 2));
INSERT INTO test_enum (id, value) VALUES (1, CAST('a' AS Enum8('a' = 1, 'b' = 2)));
SELECT getSizeOfEnumType(value) AS enum_size FROM test_enum;
UPDATE test_enum SET value = CAST('b' AS Enum8('a' = 1, 'b' = 2)) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, getSizeOfEnumType(value) FROM test_enum WHERE id = 1;
